The number of solar years past from the beginning of Kali
Yuga upto the beginning of the Saka era is 3179. This should be
converted into Jupiter's years: X 3179 or 3216 .

Now it is known that kaliyuga started in the year Vijqya

the number of years elapsed ft-om Prabhava at the beginning of
Kaliyuga)=3242|4x|. This being divided by 60 gives a remainder
2444? which means it is the 3rd year Viz. Sukla, of the cycle of 60
years of Jupiter.
